goals: ✅ Steady Sugar Management: Target < 150 mg/dL (Optimized Medication)
✅ Gentle Weight Management: Target -4 to -5 kg in 1 month
✅ Cooling Summer Hydration (Chaach, Jeera Water, Lauki/Tori)
✅ Balanced Nutrition: Focus on Whole Grains & Fresh Greens
✅ Healthy Fats: Controlled usage (Max 3 tsp / 15ml Oil per day)
🛡️ Cancer Prevention: Curcumin, Cruciferous Veg, Rasayana Herbs

schedule.label: Wake-up (Cooling Start)
schedule.food: Methi Dana Water (soaked overnight) OR Jeera Pani. (Helps maintain steady morning levels and keeps the body cool)

schedule.label: ✨ Protective Boost
schedule.food: Haldi + Kali Mirch Warm Water (½ tsp haldi, pinch black pepper, squeeze of nimbu). (Daily curcumin dose — the #1 evidence-backed pancreas protector. Piperine increases absorption by 2000%)

schedule.label: ✨ Immunity Shield
schedule.food: Giloy Water (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sat) OR Amla Water (Tue/Thu/Sun). (Giloy: Beta-cell protector. Amla: Richest Vitamin C source — 20x oranges)

schedule.label: Breakfast (Light & Protein)
schedule.food: 2 Moong Dal Chillas (add grated adrak + haldi to batter) + 1 crushed lahsun clove + Chaach. (Take Panlipase 10000. Spiced tadka ensures curcumin + gingerol + allicin in every meal)

schedule.label: ✨ Seasonal Fruits
schedule.food: Jamun (8-10 pieces, peak May-July season!) OR Papaya (small bowl, alternate days). + 1 glass Chaach. (Jamun: Anti-diabetic jamboline + anti-cancer anthocyanins. Papaya: Enzyme papain supports Panlipase)

schedule.label: Lunch (Balanced Plate)
schedule.food: 1–2 Multigrain Rotis + Dal/Paneer/Sabzi (use Haldi-Adrak-Lahsun tadka always) + Anti-Cancer Salad (shredded cabbage + tamatar + kheera + gajar + nimbu). (Rotate: Gobhi/Patta Gobhi/Broccoli sabzi 2x/week for sulforaphane)

schedule.label: ✨ Enhanced Snack
schedule.food: 5-6 Soaked Almonds + 2-3 Akhrot (Walnuts) + Sprouted Moong daily. + 1 cup Chamomile Tea with a pinch of dalchini. (Walnuts: Omega-3 anti-inflammatory. Dalchini: Insulin sensitizer)

schedule.label: Dinner (Gentle & Light)
schedule.food: 1–2 Multigrain Rotis + Light Sabzi (Karela 2x/week in rotation, Lauki/Tori other days) OR Pancreas Protection Soup. (Take Panlipase 10000. Karela stimulates pancreatic beta cells)

schedule.label: ✨ Golden Milk
schedule.food: Haldi Doodh — warm low-fat milk + ½ tsp haldi + pinch kali mirch + pinch dalchini. No sugar. (Night-time curcumin dose for deep tissue repair and anti-inflammatory action)

lifestyle.note: 50% Sabzi/Salad, 25% Protein, 25% Roti. Always take Panlipase with meals.

precautions.title: Portion Control
rules: Eat smaller, frequent meals rather than large, heavy ones.
Do not skip meals, especially if taking medications.

precautions.title: Cooking Oils & Fats
rules: Use cold-pressed mustard oil (sarson) or olive oil.
Limit total oil intake to 3 teaspoons (15ml) per day.
Completely avoid refined seed oils (sunflower, soybean, etc).

precautions.title: Meal Timings
rules: Finish dinner by 7:30 PM to 8:00 PM.
Allow a 12-14 hour overnight fasting window (e.g., 8 PM to 8 AM).
Take a gentle post-meal walk (10-15 mins) to prevent sugar spikes.

precautions.title: Hydration & Sleep
rules: Drink 2-3 liters of water daily to help Daparyl M flush out glucose.
Avoid heavy fluid intake 2 hours before bed to prevent nocturia (nighttime urination) due to prostate enlargement.
Avoid drinking large amounts of water immediately after meals; sip warm water or chaach instead.

precautions.title: Daparyl M Hygiene
rules: Daparyl M pushes sugar into urine. Combined with mild prostate enlargement, this creates a high risk for UTIs and fungal infections.
Maintain strict personal hygiene after urination to prevent bacterial growth.
